Alert.description: Displays an inline contextual message with default and destructive severity variants.
Alert.aiHint: Use for non-blocking status messages, validation summaries, or inline notifications — not for actions requiring user confirmation.

AlertDialog.description: Modal dialog that interrupts the user flow to confirm a destructive or irreversible action.
AlertDialog.aiHint: Use when the user must explicitly confirm before a delete, reset, or other destructive operation proceeds.

ApprovalCard.description: Presents an AI-generated action or proposal for human review with approve/reject controls.
ApprovalCard.aiHint: Use in agent UIs where a tool call or autonomous action requires explicit human sign-off before execution.

AspectRatio.description: Constrains its child to a fixed aspect ratio, preventing layout shift during media loading.

AsyncComboboxField.description: Combobox with debounced async search, loading state, and integrated label and error message.
AsyncComboboxField.aiHint: Use when option lists are fetched from an API as the user types; prefer over Combobox when the full list is too large to load upfront.

Avatar.description: Displays a user or entity image with automatic fallback to initials or a placeholder icon.

Badge.description: Small inline label for status, category, or count with default, secondary, destructive, and outline variants.

BentoGrid.description: CSS Grid layout container that arranges content tiles in a bento-style responsive grid.

Button.description: Trigger element for user actions with size, variant, and asChild polymorphic rendering support.
Button.aiHint: Default choice for any clickable action; use variant='destructive' for delete flows and variant='outline' for secondary actions.

Card.description: Surface container with optional header, body, and footer sections, rendered as semantic article/header/footer elements.
Card.aiHint: Use as the primary content grouping unit for dashboards, entity details, or any bounded information block.

ChatComposer.description: Compound component for composing and submitting chat messages. Compose with ChatComposerInput, ChatComposerActions, and ChatComposerSend.
ChatComposer.aiHint: Always pair with ChatContainer; use as the bottom-anchored input in any conversational UI.

ChatContainer.description: Structural layout container with header, message list (role=log), and composer slots for a chat thread.
ChatContainer.aiHint: Use as the root wrapper for any chat or agent conversation view; compose with ChatMessage and ChatComposer.

ChatMessage.description: Single chat bubble that renders user, assistant, or system messages with variant-based alignment and avatar.
ChatMessage.aiHint: Use inside ChatContainer for each turn; set variant='assistant' for AI responses and variant='user' for human input.

Collapsible.description: Disclosure widget that shows or hides content with an animated expand/collapse transition.

Combobox.description: Filterable select with a searchable dropdown for choosing from a predefined option list.
Combobox.aiHint: Use when the option list is static or small enough to load at once; use AsyncComboboxField for server-side search.

Command.description: Keyboard-driven command palette for search, navigation, and quick actions.

ConfidenceBadge.description: Displays a confidence level (auto, validated, reviewed, authored) with color-coded source-type styling.
ConfidenceBadge.aiHint: Use alongside AI-generated content or data matches to surface model confidence to the user.

DataQualityIndicator.description: Visual indicator of data quality score with dimension-level breakdown (completeness, accuracy, etc.).
DataQualityIndicator.aiHint: Use in data catalog, entity detail, or DI domain views where data reliability must be communicated to the user.

DefinitionBrowser.description: Browsable panel for exploring metric or business-term definitions with search and detail view.
DefinitionBrowser.aiHint: Use in DI domain contexts where users need to discover and inspect semantic definitions.

Dialog.description: Accessible modal overlay for presenting focused tasks or detailed content without leaving the current page.
Dialog.aiHint: Use for forms, detail views, or multi-step flows that need modal focus; use AlertDialog instead for destructive confirmations.

DropdownMenu.description: Contextual menu anchored to a trigger element, supporting items, separators, and submenus.

EmptyState.description: Placeholder UI shown when a list or data view has no content, with optional icon, message, and CTA.
EmptyState.aiHint: Use as the fallback rendering for any list, table, or search result area that may return zero items.

FieldDiff.description: Side-by-side or inline comparison of a field's old and new values with change highlighting.
FieldDiff.aiHint: Use in audit logs, approval flows, or change review UIs where field-level diffs need to be presented.

FormField.description: Wrapper that composes a Label, input control, and validation message into an accessible form field unit.
FormField.aiHint: Use as the standard wrapper for any form input; it handles id/aria linkage between label and control automatically.

Input.description: Single-line text input with size variants and full HTML input attribute support.
Input.aiHint: Default choice for any single-line text entry; wrap in FormField for accessible label and error message binding.

KeyValueList.description: Renders a list of key–value pairs in a definition-list style, suitable for metadata or property panels.

Label.description: Accessible form label that associates with an input via htmlFor.
Label.aiHint: Always pair with an input control; use inside FormField to get automatic id wiring.

MetricCard.description: Dashboard tile that highlights a key metric value with trend indicator and optional badge.
MetricCard.aiHint: Use in analytics dashboards or KPI summaries; compose multiple MetricCards in a BentoGrid for an overview layout.

NavigationMenu.description: Navigation bar with dropdown panel support for multi-level site menus. Supports horizontal (default) and vertical orientation.

Popover.description: Non-modal floating panel anchored to a trigger for contextual details, filters, or compact forms.
Popover.aiHint: Use for inline supplementary content that should not block the rest of the UI; use Dialog for tasks requiring modal focus.

Progress.description: Linear progress bar supporting both determinate (percentage) and indeterminate (loading) states.

QueryFeedback.description: Collects binary helpful/unhelpful feedback on a query result or AI-generated answer.
QueryFeedback.aiHint: Use below search results or AI responses in DI domain views to capture user satisfaction signals.

ReadonlyField.description: Displays a labeled field value in a read-only presentation, styled consistently with editable form fields.

ReasoningPanel.description: Native details/summary disclosure widget that shows or hides an AI agent's reasoning trace, with a spinner icon during thinking state.
ReasoningPanel.aiHint: Use in agent chat UIs to give users transparency into model reasoning; typically rendered before the assistant ChatMessage.

ScrollArea.description: Cross-browser custom scrollable container with styled scrollbars that match the design system.

Select.description: Accessible dropdown select for choosing a single option from a predefined list.
Select.aiHint: Use for short, static option lists; use Combobox when users need to search or filter options.

SemanticSuggest.description: AI-powered suggestion input that surfaces semantically related terms or values as the user types.
SemanticSuggest.aiHint: Use in DI domain search or metadata authoring flows where embedding-based suggestions improve discoverability.

Separator.description: Thin horizontal or vertical rule for visually dividing sections of content.

Sheet.description: Slide-in panel from any screen edge for secondary tasks, filters, or detail views without leaving context.
Sheet.aiHint: Use when the content is too detailed for a Popover but full navigation would break user flow; common for settings and filter panels.

Skeleton.description: Animated loading placeholder that matches the shape of content while data is being fetched.

StreamingText.description: Wraps streaming LLM output with an optional blinking cursor indicator while streaming is true. Token-by-token rendering is managed by the caller.

Switch.description: Toggle control for binary on/off settings, following ARIA switch role semantics.
Switch.aiHint: Use for immediate-effect boolean settings; use Checkbox when the change is deferred until form submission.

Table.description: Semantic HTML table with styled header, body, and footer for displaying structured data sets.
Table.aiHint: Use for multi-column structured data; compose Badge inside cells for status columns and Button for row-level actions.

Tabs.description: Tabbed panel that switches between content sections within the same context, following ARIA tabs pattern.

Textarea.description: Multi-line text input with optional error state and consistent form field styling.
Textarea.aiHint: Use for free-text entry longer than a single line; wrap in FormField for label and validation binding.

Toast.description: Transient notification that appears at the screen edge to confirm an action or surface a brief status update.
Toast.aiHint: Use for post-action confirmations (saved, copied, deleted); do not use for persistent errors — use Alert instead.

Toggle.description: Pressable button that maintains an active/inactive state, suitable for toolbar selections or filter toggles.

ToolCallCard.description: Displays a single agent tool invocation with its name, arguments, and execution status inline in a chat thread.
ToolCallCard.aiHint: Use inside ChatMessage for assistant turns that include tool use; shows the tool name, input, and result at a glance.

Tooltip.description: Short descriptive label that appears on hover or focus to clarify the purpose of an element.
